steps.title: Find $y$
steps.content: So $y=6$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Adding the second equation in the given system to the first equation in the given system yields $3x+(-3x+y)=12+\left(-6\right)$, which is equivalent to $y=6$.
